draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: A macro loss — towers 3–9, objectives 6–25. The map slipped and the trio couldn't anchor it.
coaching.team: Lost the objective war badly (6–25) and the towers with it. Willy's Boris went 4/8 in the jungle and the lanes fell behind despite carry, mid and offlane all reading favored — this was a fights/objective loss, not a draft one. Contest fewer, win more.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Don't contest objectives we can't win (6–25 is forcing into losses) — take them off the back of a pick, not a coin-flip.

perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Boris jungle, 4/8 into a slightly favored Crunch (55%) — eight deaths on a tanky jungler is over-committing; reset when the fight isn't there.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Kira carry, 5 deaths into a favored Legion matchup — the lane read Goldilocks324's way, so the deaths came from over-extending into the lost fights; farm safer and pick the spots.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Maco support (1/2/7) into an unfavored Riktor — low-death enabling; the loss was the team's objective war (6-25), not Mr_Meat31's lane.

threats: Chain-CC risk (4 hard-CC abilities, ~3.8s of lockdown): Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s), Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Riktor. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
Dive threat on our backline: Crunch. Assign peel for the carry and ward the flanks.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (Maco) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Maco Gift! (heal ally / hurt enemy) → Maco Fly! slam → Maco Strike! charged line ult
ourKits.winCondition: poke and heal-flex while landing the charged ult
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the charged Strike; pressure his low survivability

ourKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
ourKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
ourKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
ourKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
ourKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

ourKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
ourKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
ourKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
ourKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

ourKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
ourKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
ourKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

ourKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
ourKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
ourKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
ourKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
enemyKits.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
enemyKits.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
enemyKits.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

enemyKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
enemyKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
enemyKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
enemyKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
enemyKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
enemyKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
